privileged_info_summary: All five ERG guide numbers have been independently verified against the official CAMEO Chemicals (NOAA) datasheets: Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) = 124, Propane (CAS 74-98-6) = 115, Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS 7664-41-7) = 125, Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9) = 137, and Acetone (CAS 67-64-1) = 127. All values in the ground_truth metadata are correct. The data source is real and publicly available from NOAA's CAMEO Chemicals database, not synthetic.
